arts.ttl: Howe has made Isak 'so hard to stop' - Kuol
arts.sum: Newcastle United winger Garang Kuol believes Eddie Howe's high-energy tactical approach has got the best out of Alexander Isak this season.

arts.ttl: Glasner discusses Mateta, set-pieces and self-reflection ahead of Newcastle
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has confirmed Crystal Palace's top goalscorer Jean-Philippe Mateta will start tomorrow night against Newcastle - as the Eagles look to return to winning ways.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United have two concerns that threaten to wreck their dreams
arts.sum: If we have top notch performers then Palace have the likes of Eze, Guehi, Wharton, Meteta and a crafty manager in Oliver Glasner who at Eintracht Frankfurt won the Europa League in 2021–22 and reached the final of the German Cup the following season. United have won a trophy at Wembley and can go clear third with victory over Palace.

arts.ttl: 'My sources say…' Newcastle could now pull off £88m PSR trick as PIF get Premier League approval
arts.sum: The Saudi Public Investment Fund (PIF) are the richest club owners in the world on paper – but that doesn’t mean very much when Newcastle...

arts.ttl: Team News: Newcastle United vs. Crystal Palace injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Newcastle United and Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United Premier League fixtures compared to rivals in Champions League race
arts.sum: April 16 vs Crystal Palace (H) at 7.30pm - Premier League They know a win will take them up to third place and five points clear of Chelsea in sixth place, with the top five positions in the Premier League this year getting Champions League.

arts.ttl: Man Utd fearing season-ending striker injury after Newcastle loss
arts.sum: Man Utd fear Joshua Zirkzee has suffered a season-ending hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: 'Always': Oliver Glasner says Eddie Howe has a £32m player who never stops running ahead of Newcastle vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner takes his Crystal Palace side to Newcastle on Wednesday night. The Eagles take on the Magpies in a rearranged Premier League fixture –...

arts.ttl: Ian Wright puts Troy Deeney to shame after 'undesirable' living in Newcastle claim
arts.sum: "I look at Newcastle as a place where people will want to go there," the Londoner told Premier League Productions. "I like the way it has switched around with Eddie because when Newcastle were taken over, I'm sure people thought a lot of money was going to be spent.

arts.ttl: ‘I didn’t realise’: Ian Wright says he had no idea how good ‘outstanding’ Newcastle player is
